en_title: Inside God of War Laufey – Santa Monica Studio on Why Faye, a Ribbon, and a Cube Are Our New Heroes
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》新情报：圣莫妮卡工作室详解女主角
subtitle: 新战神，新战场
opus_summary: 圣莫妮卡工作室在State of Play上公布了《战神：劳菲》的实机演示，玩家将操控奎托斯的妻子劳菲，在神祇的来世之地“万古”中战斗。游戏并非前传，而是与2018年《战神》主线并行，劳菲将面对埃及战神塞赫美特等强敌，并与会说话的立方体弗兰克和丝带守护者露组成奇特三人组。本作延续了系列对角色深度的挖掘，同时引入更敏捷的战斗风格和魔法系统，为玩家带来全新的《战神》体验。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey is burning the series’ rulebook and sending it to the afterlife… literally. Faye, wife of Kratos, mother to Atreus, is the protagonist in the latest game from Santa Monica Studio, and the 20 minutes of footage that just dropped as part of State of Play is one hell of an introduction to our new queen of carnage, facing off against two gods of war, forming an alliance with a cosmic cube, and finding herself stuck in a fever dream of a new world.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》正在焚烧系列的规则手册，并将其送入来世——字面意义上的。奎托斯的妻子、阿特柔斯的母亲劳菲，是圣莫妮卡工作室最新游戏的主角。刚刚在State of Play上公布的20分钟实机演示，是对这位新杀戮女王的绝佳介绍：她与两位战神对决，与一个宇宙立方体结盟，并发现自己被困在一个如梦似幻的新世界中。

paragraphs.en: "We’ll always tell stories about Kratos, but I think for us, it was just a chance to talk about somebody who was so pivotal to the beginning,” says Ariel Lawrence, Game Director on God Of War Laufey. “To get to know them and push beyond into this new world and give us some place to be surprised and see how things connect. So for us, it's not a departure; it's more of an expansion."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们总会讲述关于奎托斯的故事，但对我们来说，这只是一个机会，去谈论一个对故事开端如此关键的人物，」《战神：劳菲》游戏总监Ariel Lawrence说道，「去了解她，并超越到这个世界之外，给我们一个惊喜的地方，看看事物如何相连。所以对我们来说，这不是背离，而是一种扩展。」

paragraphs.en: If you need a quick refresher, Faye – played by True Blood and Daredevil star Deborah Ann Woll – is a frost giant of Jötunheim, has the power of foresight, and was known as Laufey the Just. The Leviathan Axe from God of War was crafted for her, she has access to magic, and fought Thor. She also gave Kratos the nickname “Grumbles”.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你需要快速回顾一下：劳菲——由《真爱如血》和《超胆侠》明星Deborah Ann Woll饰演——是约顿海姆的霜巨人，拥有预见未来的能力，被称为「公正的劳菲」。《战神》中的利维坦之斧就是为她打造的，她可以使用魔法，并与索尔战斗过。她还给奎托斯起了个绰号「咕哝鬼」。

paragraphs.en: "Faye left an incredible impression on Kratos and influences how he goes about his life now," says Lawrence.
paragraphs.cn: 「劳菲给奎托斯留下了难以置信的印象，并影响着他现在的生活方式，」Lawrence说道。

paragraphs.en: Santa Monica Studio’s new project isn’t a prequel, as rumored, and actually starts the moment that Faye’s body is burnt on the funeral pyre at the beginning of 2018’s God of War. This transports her to a land called the Everywhen, the afterlife of the gods. It’s definitely not the Elysium fields of Valhalla, but a nightmarish otherworld with killer flowers and masked skeletons, where creatures are being rounded up in cages. There are bonfires of corpses and an ominous gateway hanging in the sky. It's far from a friendly place, as Santa Monica Studio’s Head of Creative, Cory Barlog, is more than happy to divulge.
paragraphs.cn: 圣莫妮卡工作室的新作并非传闻中的前传，而是从2018年《战神》开头劳菲的遗体在火葬柴堆上焚烧的那一刻开始。这将她传送到了一个名为「万古」的地方——众神的来世。这绝不是瓦尔哈拉的极乐世界，而是一个噩梦般的异界，有致命的鲜花和戴着面具的骷髅，生物被关在笼子里。到处是尸体的篝火，天空中悬挂着一扇不祥的大门。这里远非友善之地，圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监Cory Barlog非常乐意透露这一点。

paragraphs.en: "They're all assholes,” he says. “Literally every god that exists in all of the mythologies has this really terrible relationship with power and how they abuse all of it. When you put all those people - like a bunch of billionaires on an island - they think they're gonna have a happy life. No, they're all going to fight each other , they're all going to be in this strange sense of conflict because they're locked in a prison."
paragraphs.cn: 「他们都是混蛋，」他说，「几乎所有神话中的每一个神，与权力的关系都非常糟糕，他们滥用权力。当你把所有这些家伙——就像一群亿万富翁放在一个岛上——他们以为自己会过上幸福的生活。不，他们会互相争斗，陷入一种奇怪的冲突感，因为他们被困在监狱里。」

paragraphs.en: This idea is brought violently home by two notable enemies, Sekhmet and Begtse. The latter, a colossal red dude, is the Mongolian god of war. He’s so metal that his name comes from a Mongolian word for armor, and his role seems to be as a sort of afterlife bouncer for Sekhmet. As for her, she’s a big deal in Egyptian mythology rather than just another god of war, associated with plagues, vengeance, medicine and the sun. She was created by Ra, Egypt’s ruler of the Earth, sky, and underworld, to punish humanity, but got way too into it and nearly wiped them all out. God of War Laufey seems to be really leaning into the whole psycho mean girl element, and I'm here for it.
paragraphs.cn: 这一理念通过两个著名的敌人——塞赫美特和贝格策——得到了暴力体现。后者是一个巨大的红色家伙，是蒙古战神。他如此金属，名字来自蒙古语中「盔甲」一词，他的角色似乎是塞赫美特在来世的保镖。至于塞赫美特，她在埃及神话中举足轻重，不仅仅是另一个战神，还与瘟疫、复仇、医学和太阳有关。她是由埃及的天地冥界统治者拉创造出来惩罚人类的，但她过于投入，差点把人类全部消灭。《战神：劳菲》似乎非常强调这种疯狂刻薄女孩的元素，我很喜欢。

paragraphs.en: "Sekhmet still has that kind of gravitas, the scariness, the command,” says Lawrence. “We wanted to be able to really show that kind of toe-to-toe, and for [Sekhmet and Begtse] to meet."
paragraphs.cn: 「塞赫美特仍然具有那种庄严、可怕和威严，」Lawrence说，「我们希望能够真正展示那种势均力敌的对决，并让塞赫美特和贝格策相遇。」

paragraphs.en: Luckily, Faye is no slouch in the smashing the crap out of stuff department. She's easily as much of a badass as Kratos, despite not being built like a Panzer tank. She’s more athletic, taking on enemies with agility and speed rather than muscle, and her Jotun origins mean she has magic at her disposal. She also quickly gets her hands on a very unusual sword.
paragraphs.cn: 幸运的是，劳菲在砸烂东西方面也不含糊。她轻松地像奎托斯一样强悍，尽管身材不像坦克。她更运动型，以敏捷和速度而非蛮力对付敌人，而她的巨人血统意味着她可以使用魔法。她还很快拿到了一把非常不寻常的剑。

paragraphs.en: “She has a different physical profile than Kratos," explains Lawrence. "Kratos is like a brick wall, and a little stoic, but his brutality is different. How do we show somebody who's as equal [to him] as she is?"
paragraphs.cn: 「她的体型与奎托斯不同，」Lawrence解释道，「奎托斯像一堵砖墙，有点坚忍，但他的残暴方式不同。我们如何展示一个与他同样强大的人呢？」

paragraphs.en: To find a way to reflect the difference between Kratos and Faye, the team looked back across the entire series of games to take a deep look at how they’d portrayed Faye’s story so far. Lawrence explains that developing Faye's combat style proved a breath of fresh air for the studio, allowing it to pull from the series’ history while still doing something new.
paragraphs.cn: 为了找到反映奎托斯和劳菲差异的方法，团队回顾了整个系列游戏，深入审视了他们迄今为止如何描绘劳菲的故事。Lawrence解释说，开发劳菲的战斗风格对工作室来说是一股新鲜空气，使其能够从系列历史中汲取灵感，同时做一些新的事情。

paragraphs.en: "The Greek era had an influence on Faye,” she says. “The Norse era has an influence on Faye. So going [back] to our more agile, fluid combat roots but also retaining our companions, our gritty closer combat. How do those marry together and then make something that's uniquely Faye-feeling while still being a Santa Monica game?"
paragraphs.cn: 「希腊时代对劳菲有影响，」她说，「北欧时代对劳菲也有影响。所以回归我们更敏捷、流畅的战斗根源，同时保留我们的同伴和 gritty 的近战。如何将这些结合起来，创造出一种独特的劳菲感觉，同时又是一款圣莫妮卡的游戏？」

paragraphs.en: While we only got a hint of Faye's magic during the reveal, we know she's packing plenty thanks to references to her life in the previous games. She has the power of foresight, was able to cast protective wards around the forest where she and Kratos lived - remember those glowing handprints? - and has incredible strength.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然在演示中我们只看到了劳菲魔法的一丝端倪，但通过前作对她生活的提及，我们知道她拥有很多能力。她有预见未来的能力，能够在她和奎托斯居住的森林周围施放保护结界——还记得那些发光的手印吗？——并且拥有不可思议的力量。

paragraphs.en: "For Kratos, magic is a tool he wears on his belt. With Faye, magic is a part of her," says Barlog. He explains that her powers are more like Freya's, and tied to the natural world. "There's that moment in the reveal where she gets the sword and then she pops the soul out of that character, and you get that great slow-mo to see that there is a power even beyond what was shown before that she has. And it is only going to grow and evolve inside of this world. It's that idea that in the realms that we've explored, in Greece and in the Norse realms, magic is part of the air. It exists all around us. Its density is a certain amount in these realms. And when we get to the Everywhen, the density of magic is amplified by like a thousand."
paragraphs.cn: 「对奎托斯来说，魔法是他系在腰带上的工具。对劳菲来说，魔法是她的一部分，」Barlog说。他解释说，她的力量更像芙蕾雅，与自然世界相连。「在演示中，有一个时刻她拿到剑，然后她把那个角色的灵魂抽出来，你看到那个精彩的慢动作，发现她拥有甚至超越之前展示的力量。而且这种力量只会在这个世界中成长和进化。这就是我们在希腊和北欧领域探索过的理念：魔法是空气的一部分，存在于我们周围。在这些领域中，魔法密度是固定的。而当我们到达万古时，魔法密度被放大了大约一千倍。」

paragraphs.en: So, about that sword. We first discover it stuck inside a cosmic cube who is - obviously - called Phranque, and voiced by The Boys star Jack Quaid. Faye quickly finds out that the sword comes with an enchanted ribbon guardian named Rue (voiced by Perlina Lau) and suddenly gaming's weirdest threesome is born.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，关于那把剑。我们首先发现它插在一个宇宙立方体中——显然——它叫弗兰克，由《黑袍纠察队》明星Jack Quaid配音。劳菲很快发现这把剑还附带一个被施了魔法的丝带守护者，名叫露（由Perlina Lau配音），突然间，游戏中最奇怪的三人组诞生了。

paragraphs.en: "I hope by the end of this, everybody has feelings for some ribbons and a jellied cube," says Lawrence.
paragraphs.cn: 「我希望到最后，每个人都会对丝带和果冻立方体产生感情，」Lawrence说。

paragraphs.en: "It has been part of the iterations of this since the very beginning. Phranque has been carried over through every single aspect of this," added Barlog. "To me it's one of the most important parts of it. Strip away all of the fanciful and the design and the extra and what you have is this very simple cube, but you imbue inside of it an incredible struggle as well as an earnestness and a real personality."
paragraphs.cn: 「从一开始，这就是迭代的一部分。弗兰克贯穿了游戏的每一个方面，」Barlog补充道，「对我来说，这是最重要的部分之一。剥去所有幻想、设计和多余的东西，你得到的就是这个非常简单的立方体，但你赋予它难以置信的挣扎、真诚和真实的个性。」

paragraphs.en: We also see another, unnamed, almost pixie-esque character who seems important to Faye's story, but Barlog and Lawrence stay coy on his role. Whatever his part to play, Faye isn't facing the Everywhen alone.
paragraphs.cn: 我们还看到了另一个未命名的、几乎像精灵一样的角色，他似乎对劳菲的故事很重要，但Barlog和Lawrence对他的角色保持神秘。无论他扮演什么角色，劳菲都不是独自面对万古。

paragraphs.en: As you might expect from the studio that turned Kratos from a caricature to an emotional exploration of fatherhood, God of War Laufey looks ready to give you big feelings, too. As Faye adjusts to her new surroundings, she hears Kratos's voice and even sees a vision of him, a reminder that in this story’s timeframe she has only just been separated from her husband and son. She also seemed to be able to communicate with Kratos during moments of God Of War Ragnarök, so while Kratos may not be the star this time around, he and Atreus will still play an important role in Faye's story.
paragraphs.cn: 正如你对那个将奎托斯从刻板形象转变为对父爱情感探索的工作室所期望的那样，《战神：劳菲》似乎也准备好给你带来强烈的情感。当劳菲适应新环境时，她听到了奎托斯的声音，甚至看到了他的幻象，这提醒她在这个故事的时间线中，她刚刚与丈夫和儿子分离。在《战神：诸神黄昏》中，她似乎也能与奎托斯交流，所以虽然奎托斯这次可能不是主角，但他和阿特柔斯仍将在劳菲的故事中扮演重要角色。

paragraphs.en: "Everything that we're doing inside of this game, running in parallel to the timeline of 2018 and Ragnarok, also has direct connections to everything, so that everything is part of a singular universe inside of it," says Barlog. “None of this is like we're telling a side story. This is all a new chapter in the same book, a massive book, and we are starting to show that this has more than you could have imagined."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们在游戏中做的一切，与2018年和《诸神黄昏》的时间线并行，也与一切有直接联系，所以一切都是一个单一宇宙的一部分，」Barlog说，「这都不是在讲一个支线故事。这是同一本书中的新篇章，一本巨著，我们开始展示它比你想象的更丰富。」

paragraphs.en: Rachel Weber is the Head of Editorial Development at IGN and an elder millennial. She's been a professional nerd since 2006 when she got her start on Official PlayStation Magazine in the UK, and has since worked for GamesIndustry.Biz, Rolling Stone and GamesRadar. She loves horror, horror movies, horror games, Red Dead Redemption 2, and her Love and Deepspace boyfriends.
paragraphs.cn: Rachel Weber是IGN编辑发展主管，一位年长的千禧一代。自2006年在英国《官方PlayStation杂志》起步以来，她一直是一名职业极客，之后曾在GamesIndustry.Biz、Rolling Stone和GamesRadar工作。她热爱恐怖、恐怖电影、恐怖游戏、《荒野大镖客：救赎2》以及她的《恋与深空》男友们。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Persona', but required dictionary translation '女神异闻录' is missing
